theme: Pre-distort messages for a memory channel
title: Static on the Line: Pre-Distorting a Memory Channel
strategies: all-zero input: transmit nothing (reproduces the evaluator's weak baseline anchor)

per-symbol static inversion: invert the saturating nonlinearity using only the leading tap h_0, ignoring the memory taps h_1..h_L entirely (the obvious first attempt; fails badly once the memory taps carry real energy, since ignored inter-symbol interference compounds across the sequence)

causal decision-feedback precoding (Tomlinson/Volterra-style): process the sequence in order, subtracting the already-known contribution of recently chosen symbols before inverting the nonlinearity for the current target, so the whole sequence is jointly precompensated rather than inverted symbol by symbol

energy-aware refinement: within the amplitude budget, trade a small residual mismatch against the input energy it would cost to erase it, especially where the causal inversion would otherwise need to clip
